category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tailspin as a log file highlighter that can view or tail logs and highlight log patterns.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name and README use lowercase "tailspin"; binary is tspin.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation and includes overview, usage, installation, settings, and highlight groups.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/bensadeh/tailspin; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official README describes log highlighting, tspin CLI usage, less integration, customizable highlight groups, and GitHub language metadata shows Rust.
